question:
I'm new to this codebase and need a real code-based tour before my first behavior change.

Find the central runtime flow, trace it from the public API to the code that does the work, and show the nearby code paths and tests I should read next.

graph.answer:
Here’s the runtime path I’d read first in this codebase.

**Central Flow**
- Public setup starts at [`gin.go:236`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/gin/gin.go#L236) (`Default`) and [`gin.go:202`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/gin/gin.go#L202) (`New`).
- `Default()` just wraps `New()` and installs the default middleware stack (`Logger`, `Recovery`).
- `New()` builds the `Engine`, wires the root `RouterGroup`, and initializes the engine state/pool.
- Server startup goes through [`gin.go:540`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/gin/gin.go#L540) (`(*Engine).Run`), which resolves the address, validates proxy settings, updates route trees, and hands off to [`gin.go:243`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/gin/gin.go#L243) (`(*Engine).Handler`).
- Requests enter through [`gin.go:662`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/gin/gin.go#L662) (`(*Engine).ServeHTTP`), which resets per-request state and calls [`gin.go:690`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/gin/gin.go#L690) (`(*Engine).handleHTTPRequest`).
- The dispatcher cleans the path, looks up the route in the tree, handles redirects / no-route cases, and then calls [`context.go:198`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/gin/context.go#L198) (`(*Context).Next`) to run middleware + handlers.
- Route registration flows through [`gin.go:364`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/gin/gin.go#L364) (`(*Engine).addRoute`) into [`tree.go:135`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/gin/tree.go#L135) (`(*node).addRoute`), and matching comes back through [`tree.go:418`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/gin/tree.go#L418) (`(*node).getValue`).

**What To Read Next**
- Startup and engine wiring: [`gin.go:202`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/gin/gin.go#L202), [`gin.go:236`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/gin/gin.go#L236), [`gin.go:540`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/gin/gin.go#L540), [`gin.go:662`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/gin/gin.go#L662)
- Route registration and grouping: [`routergroup.go:72`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/gin/routergroup.go#L72), [`routergroup.go:86`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/gin/routergroup.go#L86), [`routergroup.go:116`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/gin/routergroup.go#L116), [`gin.go:364`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/gin/gin.go#L364), [`tree.go:135`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/gin/tree.go#L135)
- Request dispatch and middleware execution: [`gin.go:680`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/gin/gin.go#L680), [`gin.go:690`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/gin/gin.go#L690), [`context.go:198`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/gin/context.go#L198), [`tree.go:418`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/gin/tree.go#L418)

**Tests Worth Reading**
- Direct dispatcher tests: [`gin_test.go:654`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/gin/gin_test.go#L654), [`gin_test.go:671`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/gin/gin_test.go#L671), [`gin_test.go:708`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/gin/gin_test.go#L708), [`gin_test.go:746`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/gin/gin_test.go#L746), [`gin_test.go:781`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/gin/gin_test.go#L781)
- Route registration and matching: [`gin_test.go:437`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/gin/gin_test.go#L437), [`routes_test.go:89`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/gin/routes_test.go#L89), [`routes_test.go:774`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/gin/routes_test.go#L774)
- Middleware / chain behavior: [`middleware_test.go:17`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/gin/middleware_test.go#L17), [`middleware_test.go:159`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/gin/middleware_test.go#L159)
- Full startup / serving path: [`gin_integration_test.go:66`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/gin/gin_integration_test.go#L66), [`gin_integration_test.go:233`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/gin/gin_integration_test.go#L233), [`gin_integration_test.go:392`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/gin/gin_integration_test.go#L392)
- Test helper that most request tests share: [`routes_test.go:25`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/gin/routes_test.go#L25)

If you want, I can do a second pass and turn this into a tighter “edit map” for one likely first change area, like routing, middleware, or request context handling.
